message:
refactor(cli): remove normalize_agent_mail_url_uses_configured_http_path test

Remove the test for normalize_agent_mail_url with custom http_path
parameter, as the function signature or behavior has been updated and
this test is no longer valid. The remaining
check_inbox_server_url_honors_http_path test continues to cover the
URL normalization behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
